debug_info.goal:
case intro
R : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : CommRing R
S : Type u_2
inst✝ : CommRing S
f : R →+* S
x : R ⧸ ker f
x' : R
hx : (@GlimpseOfLean.kerLift R inst✝¹ S inst✝ f) ((Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x') = 0
hx' : (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = x
⊢ (Ideal.Quotient.mk (ker f)) x' = 0

proof:
have hx0 : f x' = 0 := by
    simpa [kerLift_mk] using hx
  have hxmem : x' ∈ ker f := by
    simpa [mem_ker] using hx0
  simpa [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] using hxmem
